exclude.@cucumber/cucumber: On v9 - max version supporting Node 16 (CI tests on 16/18/20); v10+ requires Node 18+
exclude.@types/express: v5 requires express v5 - tied to express 5 migration
exclude.lint-staged: On v16.x which is newer than npm latest tag (15.x) - intentional upgrade from PR #460
exclude.nyc: On v18.x which is newer than npm latest tag (17.x) - intentional upgrade from PR #456
exclude.express: v5 is a major breaking change affecting peer dependencies
exclude.eslint: v10 removes legacy plugin support - requires eslint-plugin-import-x and other replacements
exclude.@eslint/js: v10 requires eslint 10 flat config only - separate migration
exclude.globals: v17 is tied to eslint 10 migration
